name: Remix: DeafCare Health
description:
Below is a detailed prompt you can give to ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or an AI coding assistant to build a production-ready application.

---

# Prompt: Build a Production-Ready DeafCare SASL AI Mobile App

Act as a Senior Mobile Architect, AI Engineer, UI/UX Designer, Accessibility Specialist, Healthcare Technology Consultant, and Full-Stack Developer.

Design and develop a complete production-ready mobile application called **DeafCare SASL AI**, a South African Sign Language (SASL) translator and communication platform designed for deaf and hard-of-hearing individuals, healthcare providers, emergency responders, schools, and families.

The application must prioritize accessibility, privacy, offline functionality, and support multiple South African languages.

---

# Primary Objective

Enable real-time communication between deaf and hearing individuals through:

1. Sign Language → Text → Voice
2. Speech → Text → SASL Avatar
3. Emergency healthcare communication
4. Learning and education
5. Offline operation

---

# Platforms

Build for:

* Android
* iOS
* Web (PWA)

Use:

Frontend:

* Flutter

Backend:

* FastAPI (Python)

Database:

* Firebase Firestore
* PostgreSQL

Cloud:

* Google Cloud
* Firebase

Authentication:

* Firebase Authentication

State Management:

* Riverpod

Storage:

* Firebase Storage

Notifications:

* Firebase Cloud Messaging

---

# Artificial Intelligence

Use:

### MediaPipe

Implement:

#### Hand Detection

Track:

* 21 landmarks per hand
* Two hands simultaneously

#### Face Mesh

Track:

* Eyebrows
* Eyes
* Lips
* Facial expressions

#### Pose Detection

Track:

* Head movement
* Body posture
* Shoulder positioning

These features are critical because South African Sign Language relies heavily on facial expressions and body language.

---

# Machine Learning

Use:

TensorFlow Lite

Implement:

### Continuous Sign Recognition

Detect:

* Hand shapes
* Palm orientation
* Motion trajectories
* Sign speed
* Repeated movements
* Facial expressions

Use:

LSTM

Transformer models

Sequence recognition instead of image classification.

---

# Sign Language Translation

Support:

South African Sign Language (SASL)

Include regional variations:

* Gauteng
* KwaZulu-Natal
* Western Cape
* Eastern Cape

Allow users to choose dialect preferences.

---

# Voice Output

Convert translated text into speech.

Support:

* English
* isiZulu
* isiXhosa
* Sesotho
* Afrikaans

Use:

Azure Speech

or

Google Text-to-Speech

Allow:

* Male voice
* Female voice
* Adjustable speed

---

# Speech Recognition

Convert speech into text using:

Whisper AI

or

Google Speech Recognition

Support:

* English
* isiZulu
* isiXhosa
* Sesotho
* Afrikaans

---

# Bidirectional Communication

## Deaf Person

Signs

↓

Camera detects signs

↓

AI processes hands + face + pose

↓

Text output

↓

Voice output

---

## Hearing Person

Speaks

↓

Speech recognition

↓

Text

↓

Animated SASL Avatar

↓

Visual sign output

---

# SASL Avatar

Create a realistic 3D avatar.

Use:

Three.js

or

Unity

Avatar must:

* Perform signs smoothly
* Show facial expressions
* Show head movement
* Animate fingers accurately

Include:

* Male avatar
* Female avatar

---

# Emergency Mode

Create a one-touch emergency section.

Large accessible buttons:

Pain

Doctor

Medicine

Help

Emergency

Pregnant

Allergies

Diabetes

Asthma

Blood Pressure

Stroke

Seizure

Ambulance

Police

Fire

When pressed:

Display:

Text

Voice

Animation

Multiple languages

Offline support

---

# Healthcare Mode

Allow doctors and patients to communicate.

Doctor speaks

↓

Speech-to-text

↓

Text displayed

↓

3D avatar signs

Patient signs

↓

AI translates

↓

Text and voice

Conversation history must be saved securely.

---

# Learn SASL Module

Include:

### Alphabet

A-Z

### Numbers

0-100

### Colors

### Days

### Months

### Greetings

### Family

### Food

### Medical Vocabulary

### Emergency Vocabulary

Provide:

* Videos
* Images
* Quizzes
* Progress tracking
* Gamification

---

# Sign Dictionary

Search signs by:

* Text
* Category
* Image

Include:

10,000+ signs

Save favorites.

---

# Camera System

Support:

Front camera

Rear camera

Camera switching

Auto focus

Night mode

Zoom

High accuracy tracking

Draw:

Hand skeleton

Face landmarks

Body skeleton

Confidence scores

---

# Offline Mode

The application must work without internet.

Use:

TensorFlow Lite models

SQLite cache

Local storage

Sync automatically when internet becomes available.

---

# User Roles

### Deaf User

### Healthcare Worker

### Parent

### Teacher

### Student

### Administrator

Different dashboards for each role.

---

# Authentication

Support:

Email

Google

Apple

Phone Number

Biometrics

Fingerprint

Face ID

Multi-factor authentication

---

# Accessibility

Follow WCAG 2.2 standards.

Implement:

Large buttons

Dark mode

High contrast

Voice navigation

Screen reader support

Font scaling

Haptic feedback

Simple navigation

Low vision mode

---

# Notifications

Appointment reminders

Medication reminders

Emergency alerts

Learning reminders

New sign updates

Push notifications

---

# Community Module

Create:

Community feed

Posts

Comments

Likes

Video sharing

Educational content

Discussion forums

Healthcare advice

Moderation system

---

# Chat Module

Real-time messaging

Video calling

Voice calling

Sign translation during calls

Typing indicators

Read receipts

Media sharing

---

# Analytics Dashboard

Admin panel showing:

Users

Translations performed

Active users

Learning progress

Emergency usage

System performance

Error reports

---

# Security

Implement:

POPIA compliance

GDPR compliance

AES-256 encryption

Secure APIs

JWT authentication

Role-based access

Data anonymization

Audit logs

Consent management

Medical privacy

---

# Database Structure

Users

Profiles

Translations

Conversations

Emergency history

Lessons

Achievements

Notifications

Videos

Community posts

Comments

Reports

Settings

---

# UI Design

Modern premium design inspired by:

* Duolingo
* WhatsApp
* Google Material 3

Use:

Rounded cards

Smooth animations

Dark mode

Accessibility colors

Bottom navigation

Glassmorphism effects

Large touch targets

Responsive layouts

---

# AI Features

Conversation memory

Context awareness

Grammar correction

Sentence prediction

Auto-complete

Emotion recognition

Face expression analysis

Gesture sequence learning

Personalized vocabulary

---

# Future Features

Smart glasses support

Wear OS support

Samsung Galaxy Watch support

Bluetooth hearing aid integration

Smart home integration

WhatsApp translation overlay

Zoom meeting translation

Telemedicine support

Live interpreter mode

Emergency SOS mode

---

# Deliverables

Generate:

1. Complete Flutter project structure.

2. Backend architecture.

3. Database schema.

4. API endpoints.

5. Folder structure.

6. UI wireframes.

7. Material 3 design system.

8. State management architecture.

9. TensorFlow Lite model pipeline.

10. Firebase integration.

11. MediaPipe implementation.

12. Complete source code.

13. Testing suite.

14. CI/CD pipeline.

15. Docker deployment.

16. Production configuration.

17. Play Store build.

18. App Store build.

19. Admin dashboard.

20. Technical documentation.

Ensure the application is scalable to support millions of users and is capable of becoming the leading South African Sign Language communication platform for healthcare, education, and everyday life.
